meta.summary: IGV Desktop 2.19.7 for interactive genome browsing and variant review through a browser-accessible noVNC session, with IGVTools utilities included.
meta.description: IGV Desktop 2.19.7 for interactive genome browsing and variant review through a browser-accessible noVNC session, with IGVTools utilities included.

test: igv --help | grep -F 'direct Java launcher for IGV 2.19.7' >/dev/null && igv-gui --help | grep -F 'browser-accessible noVNC session' >/dev/null
igv 2>&1 | grep -F 'no X DISPLAY is available' >/dev/null
igvtools version | grep -F 'IGV Version 2.19.7' >/dev/null && igvtools 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: igvtools' >/dev/null && igvtools help sort 2>&1 | grep -F 'igvtools  sort' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-igv-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-igv-smoke && printf 'chr1	10	20	b
chr1	1	5	a
' > unsorted.bed && igvtools sort unsorted.bed sorted.bed >/tmp/taf-igvtools-sort.log 2>&1 && printf 'chr1	1	5	a
chr1	10	20	b
' > expected.bed && cmp expected.bed sorted.bed

igv-gui --help >/dev/null && (IGV_JAVA_XMX=1024m igv-gui --geometry 800x600 >/tmp/taf-igv-gui.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; ok=0; i=0; while [ $i -lt 45 ]; do if curl -fs http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html >/dev/null 2>&1; then ok=1; break; fi; i=$((i + 1)); sleep 1; done; kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; test $ok -eq 1 && grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html?autoconnect=1&resize=scale' /tmp/taf-igv-gui.log >/dev/null && grep -F 'IGV GUI is starting.' /tmp/taf-igv-gui.log >/dev/null)

upstream.name: Integrative Genomics Viewer
upstream.citation: Thorvaldsdottir, Robinson, and Mesirov. 2013. Integrative Genomics Viewer (IGV): high-performance genomics data visualization and exploration.
